suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten VAL-DASH-006 to explicitly require peer rows to show truncated pubkeys (and not placeholders) to align with dashboard-policies expected behavior.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The original dashboard-policies review failed due to placeholder pubkeys, and the fix review notes automated checks can still miss this without explicit assertion language in the contract.

rejectedObservations.observation: Undocumented nuance that using Distribute screen Copy actions may leave Finish Distribution disabled while QR flow enables progression.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous and environment-dependent behavior from a single transcript; needs broader confirmation before adding shared guidance.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add AGENTS.md guidance to prefer lucide-react over inline SVG icons.
rejectedObservations.reason: non-blocking convention note already captured in prior synthesis round and not newly evidenced by this fix re-review.

rejectedObservations.observation: ui-builder tests-first process drift in dashboard-modals transcript.
rejectedObservations.reason: process observation already captured in prior synthesis round and not newly evidenced by this fix re-review.
